roleDescription.workspace-level-owner: Has full control over all workspace bases, settings, and billing
roleDescription.workspace-level-creator: Can create, configure, and edit all bases within the workspace
roleDescription.workspace-level-editor: Can add, edit, and delete records, but cannot modify base configurations
roleDescription.workspace-level-commenter: Can view and comment on records within workspace bases
roleDescription.workspace-level-viewer: Can only view records within workspace bases
roleDescription.workspace-level-inherit: Inherits role from workspace-level team assignment
roleDescription.owner: Has full control over the base, including configuration and deletion rights
roleDescription.creator: Can fully configure the base but cannot delete it
roleDescription.editor: Can add, edit, and delete records, but cannot modify base configurations
roleDescription.commenter: Can view and comment on records within the base
roleDescription.viewer: Can only view records within the base
roleDescription.inherit: Dziedziczy rolę od zespołu bazowego lub zespołu projektu lub członka projektu
roleDescription.org-level-creator: Can fully configure and edit bases
roleDescription.org-level-viewer: Can only view records in bases
roleDescription.cloud-org-level-owner: Full access to organization and workspaces
roleDescription.cloud-org-level-creator: Może tworzyć projekty robocze i mieć dostęp do projektów, do których są zaproszone
roleDescription.cloud-org-level-viewer: Can only view organization and workspaces
